executive_1line: High-potential flagship with scalable commercial upside if execution quality stays disciplined.
managerial_focus: Scale commercial upside without losing execution discipline.
commercial_priority: Increase premium mix and defend high-quality revenue capture.
operational_priority: Maintain service consistency and execution reliability as volume scales.
peak_season_note: Peak demand should be used to scale premium mix without reducing service consistency.
why_it_matters_for_management: This outlet can act as a flagship growth engine, but only if scale does not erode delivery quality.

executive_1line: Growth-capable destination outlet with upside that should be managed with awareness of seasonal demand shape.
managerial_focus: Capture growth while managing seasonal demand shape carefully.
commercial_priority: Grow demand monetization without over-reading temporary peaks.
operational_priority: Keep resource planning flexible around seasonality and demand swings.
peak_season_note: Peak tourist periods can accelerate growth, but seasonal demand shape should still be monitored.
why_it_matters_for_management: This outlet adds growth breadth to the network, but its demand profile should be interpreted with seasonal discipline.

executive_1line: Seasonal demand-led outlet where stronger conversion discipline can turn traffic windows into higher value.
managerial_focus: Turn seasonal traffic into stronger conversion and yield quality.
commercial_priority: Improve seasonal package conversion and demand monetization.
operational_priority: Align staffing and execution rhythm with seasonal demand windows.
peak_season_note: Most attractive in stronger tourist months; focus on conversion, package mix, and demand monetization.
why_it_matters_for_management: This outlet shows that seasonal demand is not enough on its own; management quality determines whether traffic becomes value.

executive_1line: Operationally pressured outlet that needs workforce stabilization before pushing harder on growth.
managerial_focus: Stabilize workforce pressure before pushing harder on growth.
commercial_priority: Avoid over-pushing sales until operational pressure is more controlled.
operational_priority: Reduce workload strain, strengthen roster discipline, and protect service quality.
peak_season_note: Peak demand may intensify pressure exposure; roster discipline should be tightened before busy periods.
why_it_matters_for_management: This outlet matters because unresolved team strain can damage both service quality and future growth capacity.

executive_1line: Commercially attractive outlet with room to grow, provided delivery consistency is protected.
managerial_focus: Protect delivery consistency while expanding monetization quality.
commercial_priority: Improve yield capture and upscale monetization with controlled growth.
operational_priority: Prevent execution drift as commercial activity expands.
peak_season_note: Peak periods are favorable for yield capture if execution quality remains disciplined.
why_it_matters_for_management: This outlet matters as a commercially attractive node where disciplined execution can translate into scalable upside.

executive_1line: High-demand dual-risk outlet where commercial leakage and team pressure must be managed together.
managerial_focus: Fix value leakage while controlling team pressure in a high-demand environment.
commercial_priority: Reduce commercial leakage and improve value capture from existing demand.
operational_priority: Control pressure exposure, staffing intensity, and delivery consistency.
peak_season_note: Peak traffic can increase both revenue opportunity and leakage/pressure risk at the same time.
why_it_matters_for_management: This outlet matters because it captures a classic management problem: strong demand can still underperform if value leakage and team pressure are not handled together.

executive_1line: Tourist-facing growth outlet where conversion quality and timing discipline can unlock stronger returns.
managerial_focus: Maximize tourist demand windows with stronger conversion timing and discipline.
commercial_priority: Strengthen conversion during tourist-heavy months and defend yield.
operational_priority: Protect timing, service consistency, and throughput quality during peak periods.
peak_season_note: Tourist-heavy months likely improve demand; conversion quality should be defended during peak flow.
why_it_matters_for_management: This outlet matters because tourist-facing demand can create strong upside when conversion timing and service delivery are managed well.
